name: Linked logo section
description: The linked logo section is used to display a list of logos which explicitly link to additional pages or resources.
usage:
The Linked logo section highlights a collection of logos as interactive navigational elements, building on the [Linked logo section](/sites/construct/linked-logo-section) by pairing each logo with a link to additional pages or resources.

### Placing additional contextual elements

This pattern does not include a description slot.

For the 25/75 and 100 layouts, when a description or CTA block is required, use the [Basic section](/sites/construct/basic-section) and place the Linked logo section (without the [Rule](/sites/construct/linked-logo-section#anatomy) and [Heading](/sites/construct/linked-logo-section#anatomy)) below it, rather than extending this pattern.

For the 50/50 layout, the [Linked logo block](/sites/construct/linked-logo-block) is supported within the Basic section. Therefore use the [Basic section](/sites/construct/basic-section) alone instead of introducing a separate Linked logo section.

### When to use

*   Each logo needs to link to an additional page or resource
*   Logos act as primary navigational elements rather than decorative assets

### When not to use

*   If logos are purely decorative or editorial and do not require interaction, use the [Logo section](/sites/construct/logo-section) instead
*   When items require rich structured content (e.g., detailed descriptions, lists, CTAs), use the [Basic section](/sites/construct/basic-section) or [Divided section](/sites/construct/divided-section) instead
*   If multiple groups or categories need to be displayed, separate them into multiple sections or use the [Tab section](/sites/construct/tab-section)

table.name: Rule
table.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new section.

table.name: Heading
table.description: The section heading communicates the primary subject or theme of the section.

table.name: Linked logo blocks
table.description: [Linked logo block](wiki-ref://grid-ymtdOF6n4R/i-fhZD60Hwqn) is a content unit that displays a logo with a link to additional pages or resources.

table.name: Layout
table.description: The Linked logo section layout supports three configurations: a full-width layout where the blocks are placed below the [Heading](wiki-ref://grid-YfHOdsWGM_/i-qeggI3fKKD), and 50/50 and 25/75 layouts where the blocks are positioned beside the [Heading](wiki-ref://grid-YfHOdsWGM_/i-qeggI3fKKD).

properties.name: Section rule
properties.description: The rule component indicates the beginning of a new pattern
properties.constraint: Only use the default style for the section-level rule

properties.name: Linked heading
properties.description: The heading may function as a link when clearly indicated.

properties.name: Bottom padding
properties.description: The type of padding applied to the bottom of the pattern

properties.name: Large layout
properties.description: The intended grid layout for the section.

properties.name: Linked logo image
properties.description: 16:9 image container with the logo image inside

properties.name: Link text
properties.description: The link text for the logo
